entries.description: Authored verification-surface-strategy.md section 9: second cross-target datapoint (platform), Gemini-pull non-silent REPLICATED (N=2) with finding-yield nuance, default-pull-provider held; pull-template meta-finding did NOT recur (N=1) -> no template fix, no release; cross-target aggregator + MixedTargetError exercised on real inputs. pull-verifier.md not updated (no code shipped; its per-set sections are as-built-code records).

Conditional pull-template instruction-tension fix: NO-OP (recorded). Recurrence gate did not trip (meta-finding N=1, did not recur on platform). No template change, no release; classify_framing_strength stays ADVERSARIAL.
Authored change-log.md (both sessions; no release) and lesson L-073-1 (a replication confirms one property not a headline; name which held and which did not).

Routed next-session-set recommendation via route(task_type=analysis) -> google/gemini-pro (cross-provider, L-064-6). Primary: Set 074 greenfield finding-power track (the property N=2 did NOT establish). Saved raw to s2-next-session.md.

Cross-provider session verification: routed_gate REQUIRED (cross-artifact + breadth 8 files); verified by openai/gpt-5.4 (cross-provider from anthropic orchestrator). Verdict VERIFIED, 0 blocking findings, 1 NIT (cross-target-comparison.md forward-referenced the synthesis as section 8; it landed in new section 9). Fixed the 2 forward refs to section 9 (lines 9, 157; left correct section 8.3/8.4 refs to Set 072 content) per L-065-1; NOT re-verified (wording-fix re-verify is L-071-1 nit-churn). s2-verification.md saved raw.

Advisory pathAwareCritique dogfood (multi-provider, openai+google) over the set diff (--diff-base HEAD) -> path-aware-critique.json, ok=True. Gemini VERIFIED 0 findings. GPT-5.4 1 Major contract-drift: change-log.md says CLOSED/VERIFIED while session-state.json still in-progress. ADJUDICATED false-positive (pre-close timing artifact, L-070-1): change-log close-out language is the standard forward-looking convention written just before close_session; the critic ran before close-out, and its own concrete fix (run close_session) is the imminent next step. Drives NO new doc/code change -> dogfood converges. Authoritative verdict is the cross-provider session verification (VERIFIED).
